claim_boundary: This protocol evaluates whether birth-date-only Mayan expression signatures align with independently labeled public biography themes. It is stronger than occupation-only scoring, but still does not prove metaphysical destiny.

dataset.no_kin_leakage_rule: The history-labeling script must not import mayan_kin or calculate Kin/seal/tone.

history_label_forced_choice.description: For each public figure, compute a birth-date-only weighted expression signature and choose the best matching detailed biography label set among one true case plus distractors.

time_split_prediction.description: Use only post-cutoff dated evidence as the target for evaluating forward-looking alignment.

anti_leakage_rules: Biography labels are generated before any Kin calculation.
Do not edit holdout labels after inspecting Mayan prediction failures.
Use train/dev for interpretation tuning; holdout is final reporting only.
Time-split future evidence must come from sentences with explicit years after the cutoff.
Undated biography text may support general history labels but cannot count as future evidence.
